message:
feat: add new tweets to showcase and testimonials

Showcase:
- @astuyve: car negotiation via browser/email/iMessage (16❤️)
- @dreetje: supermarket order with 1Password + MFA (119❤️)
- @stevengonsalvez: spend tracking, kids lunch, scrum master
- @nathanclark_: writing system with Droid
- @_KevinTang: HN content curation
- @danpeguine: bloodwork → Notion (50❤️)
- @chrisrodz35: YouTube summarization cron (25❤️)
- @christinetyip: shared memory between bots

Testimonials:
- @davemorin: "living in the future since ChatGPT" (front page)
- Plus 11 new entries in testimonials-extra

files.patch:
@@ -541,5 +541,79 @@
     "images": [
       "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_AtTRsWIAA9vdL.jpg"
     ]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013811099028557966",
+    "author": "astuyve",
+    "quote": "It may not be AGI, but Clawdbot is automatically negotiating with multiple dealers for my next car via browser, email, and imessage and it's amazing.",
+    "category": "automation",
+    "likes": 16,
+    "images": [
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_J-F2FXcAAVFM_.jpg"
+    ]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013645067441844697",
+    "author": "dreetje",
+    "quote": "My @clawdbot has managed to order things itself from @albertheijn (our supermarket) when our cleaning lady sent me a message.\n\nIt logged in using shared credentials in my @1Password, then waited for the old style text message MFA (read it through @beeper iMessage bridge using MCP). And placed the items in my basket!\n\nSo helpful.",
+    "category": "automation",
+    "likes": 119
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013650626962424047",
+    "author": "stevengonsalvez",
+    "quote": "Tracks my spends, books and tracks my kids lunch, scrum master with some motivation.\n\nTook screenshots for this tweet and asked it to blur out anything finance or personal - used imagemagick to work it out.\n\nOh and spins off codex's and claude's to fix code rabbits PR comments.",
+    "category": "productivity",
+    "likes": 1,
+    "images": [
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_Hr5YwWkAkIS2_.jpg",
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_Hr6zAXgAA_Iy_.jpg",
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_Hr_mAWkAQCqzM.jpg"
+    ]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013549390615715905",
+    "author": "nathanclark_",
+    "quote": "I've now got my @clawdbot across the writing system so he can trigger @droid exec to execute the writing pipeline.\n\nIt's Sassy the Sasquatch, IYKYK. Very Aussie reference.",
+    "category": "developer",
+    "likes": 1,
+    "images": [
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_GP9HkWEAAXyTO.jpg"
+    ]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013499715892006998",
+    "author": "_KevinTang",
+    "quote": "I have @clawdbot setup to look at Hacker News trending and send me links to articles it thinks I'd be interested in!\n\nPersonal content curation.",
+    "category": "automation",
+    "likes": 5,
+    "images": [
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_FjTAnXAAEnCBc.jpg",
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_FjTAmXUAAN4kC.jpg"
+    ]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013388700479058068",
+    "author": "danpeguine",
+    "quote": "Today I asked @clawdbot to organize all my bloodworks lab results into a neat Notion database.",
+    "category": "automation",
+    "likes": 50,
+    "images": [
+      "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/G_D-NpmWIAA9WKF.jpg"
+    ]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013257743004545257",
+    "author": "chrisrodz35",
+    "quote": "Kicking bad habits with @clawdbot.\n\nI like watching youtube videos but it's time I could spend producing instead of consuming.\n\nSetup a daily cron that summarizes new videos with key takeaways and actionable insights. Now I can get the learnings without the time sink!",
+    "category": "productivity",
+    "likes": 25
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "2013196232181637500",
+    "author": "christinetyip",
+    "quote": "I connected mine to an external memory layer - check out the shared-memory skill in clawdhub.\n\nClawdbot helps me build my second brain and selectively shares context and state with my partner's clawdbot.",
+    "category": "integration",
+    "likes": 1
   }
 ]
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -501,5 +501,60 @@
     "quote": "clawdbot is like poke on crack. I genuinely can't believe one is a VC funded company and the other is like one dude lol",
     "author": "habibislop",
     "url": "https://x.com/habibislop/status/2013141122596356524"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Check out the incredible work of @steipete with @clawdbot for a glimpse into the future.",
+    "author": "yannickfe",
+    "url": "https://x.com/yannickfe/status/2013721873440227789"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "I subscribe every word here by @viticci. Clawdbot is a glimpse of the future. And once you discover plugins… 🤯",
+    "author": "Bitomule",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Bitomule/status/2013678190766502016"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "A little late to the party, but @clawdbot is incredible—props to @steipete et al.",
+    "author": "0xtotaylor",
+    "url": "https://x.com/0xtotaylor/status/2013757719052784102"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "It's magical. I tried a few experiments on my own earlier by using ollama and telegram to act as my personal assistant which I could access from anywhere but then @clawdbot came along, did all that AND so much more! I still can't believe I have my own digital concierge who I can talk to on Whatsapp.",
+    "author": "cryptikcell",
+    "url": "https://x.com/cryptikcell/status/2013685623354204300"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Make yourself a favor and install it. We've barely begun to tap into the potential of personal assistants. There's no going back.",
+    "author": "mneves75",
+    "url": "https://x.com/mneves75/status/2013675662268158367"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Brother… it's a game changer. Seriously transformed so much for me.",
+    "author": "tysonhutchins_",
+    "url": "https://x.com/tysonhutchins_/status/2013452098281582944"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot on a Linux/macOS system can be a true agentic OS that Windows can never be. With all the money Microsoft has.",
+    "author": "TahaTesser",
+    "url": "https://x.com/TahaTesser/status/2013355318072226266"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot is the latest (and potentially most \"out there\") UX for what you're looking for — system orchestration by LLM via messaging gateway (Slack, Discord, Whatsapp, Google chat, or iMessage).",
+    "author": "Nateemerson",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Nateemerson/status/2013380646828417496"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot up and running in my discord in less than 20 mins. Incredibly easy and powerful.",
+    "author": "techfrenAJ",
+    "url": "https://x.com/techfrenAJ/status/2013358914092302390"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Thanks to @steipete and contributors for @clawdbot, advancing A(G)I immensely!",
+    "author": "WolframRvnwlf",
+    "url": "https://x.com/WolframRvnwlf/status/2013220790448136621"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot has completely taken over my life. I thought the whole 'world domination' bit was a silly joke but I had no idea how addictive it was to be productive. Replacing all of life's digital painpoints with a text message?? You've created a monster.",
+    "author": "_Jack_Alderson",
+    "url": "https://x.com/_Jack_Alderson/status/2013236253848633396"
   }
 ]
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -14,6 +14,11 @@
     "author": "markjaquith",
     "url": "https://x.com/markjaquith/status/2010430366944055433"
   },
+  {
+    "quote": "At this point I don't even know what to call @clawdbot. It is something new. After a few weeks in with it, this is the first time I have felt like I am living in the future since the launch of ChatGPT.",
+    "author": "davemorin",
+    "url": "https://x.com/davemorin/status/2013723700668096605"
+  },
   {
     "quote": "Just shipped my first personal AI assistant. On WhatsApp. Builds my second brain while I chat. Memory moves across agents (Codex, Cursor, Manus, etc.) And a lot more skills still to plug in. Personal AI is getting real with @steipete's @clawdbot.",
     "author": "christinetyip",
